aboutPage.description:
A custom quiz site is an interactive platform where users have the freedom to create their own quizzes in a simple and intuitive way. They can customize questions, answers, and even add visual elements such as images and videos to make their quizzes more engaging.

Once a user has created a quiz, they can share it with friends or the general public, encouraging participation and interaction. Participants can answer questions, view their results, and leave comments on the quiz. This commenting functionality allows for direct feedback, discussions, and social interaction, making the process a collaborative and fun experience.

In addition, the site offers a user-friendly interface and customization options, allowing creators to adapt their quizzes to a variety of topics, such as trivia, general knowledge, personality tests, and more. The idea is to encourage creativity while promoting sharing and interaction among users.

This dynamic environment transforms quizzes into a form of social entertainment, where anyone can be both a creator and a participant in custom quizzes.
aboutPage.privacy:
Our quiz site values your privacy and security. Therefore, we want to clarify that we only use strictly necessary cookies to ensure the proper functioning of our site. These cookies allow you to navigate and use all the features, such as taking quizzes and accessing your response history, efficiently and securely.

Additionally, we do not store sensitive payment information in our database. All payment processing is securely handled by Stripe, one of the most recognized and trusted payment platforms in the market. Stripe adheres to the highest standards of security and compliance, ensuring that your financial data is protected throughout the transaction process.

Our commitment is to provide a safe and transparent experience for all our users. If you have any questions or concerns about our privacy policy, we are here to help.

hero.subtitle: A free quiz maker for text quizzes, multiple choice questions, leaderboards, and competition. Create free text quizzes and use images when you need a visual quiz experience.

stylesSection.title: Online quiz maker
stylesSection.subtitle: Choose the quiz format you want to create, share, and rank.
stylesSection.rightAndWrong: Multiple choice quiz: Create a free text quiz with questions, answer options, and one correct answer. Great for trivia, school quizzes, fandom quizzes, games, sports, and friendly competitions.
stylesSection.personality: Personality quiz: Create result-based quizzes where each answer leads players toward a personality, character, or custom result.
stylesSection.list: List quiz: Organize ideas, rankings, topics, and interactive lists to share with your community.
stylesSection.aboutMe: About me quiz: Invite friends to find out who knows you best and turn the answers into a fun challenge.

explorationSection.title: Explore quizzes with leaderboards
explorationSection.subtitle: Take quizzes made by other users, compete for top scores, and discover new challenges.
explorationSection.public: Public quizzes: Publish your quiz on your profile so other people can take it, compete, and appear on the leaderboard.
explorationSection.private: Private quizzes: Share your quiz by link with friends, students, or specific groups.

layout.metadataTitle: Online Quiz Maker | Create a Free Text Quiz with QuestioFlux

selectTypePage.title: Online quiz maker
selectTypePage.desc: Create your own online quiz with QuestioFlux. The normal text quiz is free: add questions, multiple choice answers, correct answers, publish your quiz, and track players on the leaderboard.
selectTypePage.subtitle: Choose a format to get started. You can create a question-and-answer quiz, build a challenge for students, make trivia for friends, or use images for a more visual quiz experience.

descriptions.rightAndWrongText: Use this format to create a free online text quiz with answer options and one correct answer. It is ideal for trivia quizzes, quick tests, school activities, fandom quizzes, games, sports, series, and community challenges. After publishing, players can compete for the best score on the leaderboard.
descriptions.personalityText: This format is made for quizzes where each answer moves the player toward a result. It works well for ideas like “which character are you?”, “what type of player are you?”, or “which style matches your personality?”.
descriptions.imageText: The image quiz format lets you create visual questions and alternatives using text, images, or both. It is useful for flags, characters, logos, maps, games, objects, places, and visual identification challenges.
descriptions.competitionText: QuestioFlux is built to make quizzes competitive. Players can take your quiz, compare results, and compete for leaderboard positions in public quizzes, private quizzes, classroom challenges, or quizzes made for friends.
descriptions.studentText: Teachers and students can use the quiz maker to review lessons, test knowledge, and create interactive activities. The question-and-answer format works well for classes, study sessions, reviews, and quick challenges.

metadata.title: Online Quiz Maker | Create a Free Text Quiz with QuestioFlux
metadata.desc: Create a free online text quiz with questions, answers, multiple choice options, and leaderboards. Make quizzes for friends, students, games, and communities.
metadata.keywords: online quiz maker, quiz maker, free quiz maker, create a quiz, make a quiz, make your own quiz, trivia quiz maker, multiple choice quiz maker, question and answer quiz maker, quiz maker for students, quiz with leaderboard, image quiz maker

faq.title: Frequently asked questions about creating quizzes
faq.intro: Here are quick answers about creating, publishing, and sharing quizzes on QuestioFlux.
faq.question1Title: How do I create an online quiz?
faq.question1Text: Choose a quiz type, add your questions, write the answer options, mark the correct answer, and publish. Then you can share the link with friends, students, or your community.
faq.question2Title: Can I create a quiz for free?
faq.question2Text: Yes. The normal text quiz is free and lets you create questions, answer options, and correct answers to publish and share online.
faq.question3Title: Can I make a quiz with a leaderboard?
faq.question3Text: Yes. QuestioFlux includes leaderboards so your quizzes can become competitions and show the players with the best results.
faq.question4Title: Can I create an image quiz?
faq.question4Text: Yes. You can create quizzes with images in questions and alternatives, which is useful for visual challenges, characters, flags, logos, and similar topics.
